heading: Judicial review
label: 1018 Judicial review

(a)(1) and (c), was in the original “this title”, meaning title I (§ 101 et seq.) of , , , known as the Rock Island Railroad Transition and Employee Assistance Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. children.text: any decision of the bankruptcy court with respect to the constitutionality of any provision of this chapter; and

any decision of the court having jurisdiction over the reorganization of the Milwaukee Railroad with respect to the constitutionality of the Milwaukee Railroad Restructuring Act ( et seq.),45 U.S.C. 901

children.heading: Appellate proceedings
children.label: b Appellate proceedings
children.text: If appeals are taken from decisions described in subsection (a) of this section involving section 1005 or 1008 of this title or section 9 or 15 of the Milwaukee Railroad Restructuring Act [ or 915], the court of appeals shall determine such appeals in a consolidated proceeding, sitting en banc.145 U.S.C. 908See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Action in United States Court of Claims
children.label: c Action in United States Court of Claims
children.text: Nothing in this chapter or in the Milwaukee Railroad Restructuring Act ( et seq.) shall limit the right of any person to commence an action in the United States Court of Claims under (commonly referred to as the Tucker Act).45 U.S.C. 901section 1491 of title 281
